text.title: codemod-recipe-library Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the codemod-recipe-library methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-mechanical-edits
step.action: List every mechanical edit (renames, signature changes).

step.name: pick-ast-tool
step.decision-gate: If only string-literal edits are needed, ast-grep is enough; never fall back to regex.

step.name: author-recipe-with-fixtures
step.action: For each edit, write transform + before fixture + after fixture.

step.name: wire-smoke-test
step.action: Add smoke-test.sh to CI; ensure every recipe runs.
